name: Diamond Head Market & Grill
tagline: Monsarrat Ave institution since the '90s — the lemon crunch cake alone is worth the trip.
mustOrder: lemon crunch cake — legendary, the signature
parking: Small lot behind the market; street parking on Monsarrat Ave
talkStory: Open 25+ years on Monsarrat Ave, serving plate lunches, poke, and baked goods from a takeout window. The lemon crunch cake is genuinely iconic — people order full cakes for parties. Tourists found this place (it's on the Diamond Head hike route), but it's a legitimate institution, not a tourist trap. The insider move: go on a weekday and avoid the post-hike weekend rush. The market side has good grab-and-go snacks too. Daily 7:30am–8pm.
